infotexts.orderdialog.retrieveitems: Retrieve items from the abandoned outpost.
infotexts.orderdialogself.retrieveitems: I'll retrieve items from the abandoned outpost.
infotexts.orderdialog.retrievewreckitems: Retrieve marked items from wrecks and open water.
infotexts.orderdialogself.retrievewreckitems: I'll retrieve marked items from the wreck.
infotexts.orderdialogself.markretrievecontainer: I'll mark this container for retrieval.
infotexts.retrieveitems.abort.tooinjured: Too injured to continue. Returning to the submarine.
infotexts.retrieveitems.abort.notarget: I can't find an abandoned outpost to loot.
infotexts.retrieveitems.abort.nostorage: I can't find anywhere appropriate to store the remaining loot.
infotexts.retrieveitems.refused: I can only do that while I'm already inside a cleared abandoned outpost or beacon station.
infotexts.retrieveitems.hostiles: I won't start retrieval until the outpost is clear of hostiles.
infotexts.retrievewreckitems.abort.notarget: I can't find any marked wreck salvage.
infotexts.retrievewreckitems.abort.nooxygen: I need a full oxygen tank before leaving the submarine.
infotexts.retrievewreckitems.abort.nogear: I need diving gear before leaving the submarine.
infotexts.retrievewreckitems.abort.noairlock: I can't find a usable airlock.
